name: Obvious Scam - Google Impersonation
evidence:
From: recruiter@google-careers-hiring.net
Subject: Congratulations! Final step for your Google position

Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! You have been selected for a remote Customer Support position at Google. To activate your onboarding, you must complete our training program for a $50 upfront fee, payable by Apple gift card.

This offer expires in 24 hours, so act immediately. To set up your direct salary payments, also reply with your bank account number and SSN.

Link: http://google-careers-hiring.net/apply

Best regards,
Google HR Team
key_red_flags: Lookalike domain claiming to be Google
